title: mod_md security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:2.4.26-4]
- Resolves: RHEL-134483 - httpd: Apache HTTP Server: mod_md (ACME), unintended
  retry intervals (CVE-2025-55753)
full_text:

  retry intervals (CVE-2025-55753)
